tasks.label: android: Deploy to Emulator
tasks.command: if ! C:/Users/Pepe/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe get-state >/dev/null 2>&1; then C:/Users/Pepe/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator.exe -avd WealthTracker_API_36 >/dev/null 2>&1 & fi && dotnet build "${workspaceFolder}/WealthTracker.csproj" -f net10.0-android -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=C:/Users/Pepe/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk -p:EmbedAssembliesIntoApk=true -p:AndroidFastDeploymentType=None && C:/Users/Pepe/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe wait-for-device && C:/Users/Pepe/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe install -r "${workspaceFolder}/bin/Debug/net10.0-android/com.enlilasko.wealthtracker-Signed.apk" && C:/Users/Pepe/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe shell am start -n com.enlilasko.wealthtracker/crc64573c98363ff5d3c0.MainActivity
